latin: 'Ego sum — ego, Marius!' parvus faber tubi clamavit. tum in tubum magnum desiluit et per mundum mirum subterraneum cucurrit ut principem servaret.

questions.prompt: Why did Mario jump into the pipe?

translation: 'It's-a me — me, Mario!' the little plumber shouted. Then he jumped down into a large pipe and ran through a wondrous underground world to save the princess.
